steps.title: Translate 'p% greater than 10'
steps.content:
When a number is p% greater than another, we multiply that number by (1 + p/100). So if 140 is p% greater than 10:
$$140 = 10\left(1 + \frac{p}{100}\right)$$

steps.title: Solve for p
steps.content:
Divide both sides by 10:
$$14 = 1 + \frac{p}{100}$$
Subtract 1:
$$13 = \frac{p}{100}$$
Multiply by 100:
$$p = 1300$$
That matches choice B — B is correct.
